title: Capital Markets and Securities (Registers of Interests in Securities) Regulations, 1996
title_en: Capital Markets and Securities (Registers of Interests in Securities) Regulations, 1996

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Capital Markets and Securities (Registers of Interests in Securities) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations, unless the context requires otherwise— " Act " means the Capital Markets and Securities Act 1 ; 1 Cap. 79 " register " means a register of interests in securities required under section 51 of the Act .

provisions.title: Form of registers
provisions.content: Every licensed dealer, dealers representative, investment adviser, investment representative and financial journalist shall maintain a register of securities in which he has an interest in the form prescribed in the Schedule to these Regulations.

provisions.title: Timing of entry on register
provisions.content: Particulars of the securities in which a person has an interest shall be entered in the register within twenty four hours of acquisition or disposal thereof.
